character_designs.name_cn: 肃明飞翼虫族将军多状态角色板
character_designs.identity: High-ranking Suming War-Armor Office airborne combat general used for wall dives, aerial reconnaissance, battlefield signaling, and vertical pursuit pressure

body_and_face.species_lock: Clearly non-human airborne combat insect general; never a winged human, angel, bird-man, immortal, or human general wearing wings.
body_and_face.scale: Approximately 2.3 to 2.6 meters tall in-world, high-rank but lighter and more vertical than Li Tang.
body_and_face.build: Narrow hard chest and back, compressed abdomen, wing-root shoulders, jumping and perching lower limbs, clawed wall-gripping feet.
body_and_face.head: Wide insect brow, dark compound eyes, bone-white mandible guard, short antenna bundle, dark-green neck membrane, no human face or hair.
body_and_face.wings: Two pairs of translucent black-green membrane wings, or upper hard wing covers plus lower thin membrane wings, rooted in shoulder-back carapace with bone-white wax seals and old iron flight harness.

constant_anchors: two pairs of translucent black-green membrane wings
dark compound eyes and short antenna bundle

state_designs.silhouette: Half-folded wings, clawed feet gripping a blackstone parapet or roof edge, torso angled down like a command predator.
state_designs.color_logic: Black-green wing membrane and deep carapace dominate; bone-white wing-root seals and old iron show military control.
required_details: wings must attach to carapace, not cloak or human shoulders
clawed feet must visibly grip stone
rank plaque must stay tiny and physical
no feather wings or angel pose

state_designs.silhouette: Full wing spread in a downward dive, short spear or hook-claw cable leading the motion, body streamlined but insectoid.
state_designs.color_logic: Wing translucency carries the main shape; dark chitin and old iron keep it military rather than mystical.
required_details: flight reads as physical wing movement, not magic aura
hook-claw cable or throwing spear must show battlefield role
body remains non-humanoid from every angle
no bird anatomy

state_designs.silhouette: Wings narrowed against wind, one clawed foot braced on blackstone, messenger bone whistle and command belt visible.
state_designs.color_logic: Snowline blue-grey overlays the black-green and bone-white system without turning the figure into Northern beastfolk.
required_details: bone whistle or signal object must be visible
wing fold must remain readable
clawed perching foot must stay visible
no feather cloak

detail_panels.notes: Membrane wings rooted in shoulder-back carapace, old iron flight harness, bone-white wax seals.
Dark compound eyes, bone-white mandible guard, short antenna bundle, no human face or hair.
Clawed feet gripping blackstone parapet, roof edge, or flagpole.
Short throwing spear, hook-claw cable, wing-edge bone spurs, messenger bone whistle.
Black-green membrane, deep-brown carapace, bone-white wax, old iron, dark-green belt, cold-gold pin, restrained dark-red scratch, blackstone snow.

character_designs.name_cn: 肃明重甲虫族将军多状态角色板
character_designs.identity: High-ranking Suming War-Armor Office siege and gate-pressure general with a lower body heavier and broader than Li Tang

body_and_face.species_lock: Clearly non-human heavy combat insect general; never a human warlord in giant armor and never a Li Tang duplicate.
body_and_face.scale: Approximately 2.7 to 3.1 meters tall in-world, broader and heavier than Li Tang.
body_and_face.build: Massive chest and back carapace with extremely thick lower body: broad abdomen plates, heavy pelvic carapace, oversized hind limbs, large clawed feet, and low center of gravity.
body_and_face.lower_body_rule: The abdomen, pelvic armor, hind legs, support limbs, and clawed feet must be visibly thicker, wider, and more stable than Li Tang's lower body.
body_and_face.head: Low-set armored head, deep narrow compound eyes, thick bone-white mandible guard, neck nearly buried in chest armor, no human face or hair.

constant_anchors: lower body broader and heavier than Li Tang
four to six thick support limbs or two huge hind limbs plus side support claws

state_designs.silhouette: Extremely wide lower body planted like a living gate, heavy shield or ram hammer vertical, head low under chest armor.
state_designs.color_logic: Deep black-green and old iron dominate, with bone-white seal rings marking Suming control.
required_details: lower body must be broader than Li Tang
large clawed feet and pelvic armor must be visible
shield reads as gate pressure, not knight shield
no humanoid armor suit

state_designs.silhouette: Head lowered, shoulder carapace forward, abdomen compressed downward, thick hind limbs pushing a ram hammer or shoulder impact.
state_designs.color_logic: Impact wear appears as old iron scratches and muted dark-red marks, not gore.
required_details: abdomen and pelvic carapace must carry impact load
hind limbs must look slow but unstoppable
ram hammer or shoulder impact must be fixed to insect body logic
no Li Tang-style forearm blade focus

state_designs.silhouette: Wide planted lower body under blackstone snow, gate shield angled against wind or attack, command belt and rank marks still readable.
state_designs.color_logic: Snowline frost overlays the heavy Suming palette without turning the figure into a Northern beast or rock monster.
required_details: large lower limbs and clawed feet must not be hidden by snow
rank plaque stays tiny and physical
body reads as insect siege general
no Northern beastfolk silhouette

detail_panels.purpose: Lock the requested difference from Li Tang.
detail_panels.notes: Abdomen, pelvic armor, hind limbs, support claws, and feet are visibly wider and heavier than Li Tang.
Low head, narrow compound eyes, thick bone-white mandible guard, neck buried in chest armor.
Old iron heavy harness, dark-green command belt, seal rings, small locked rank plaque.
Black iron gate shield, ram hammer, heavy short halberd, iron chain hooks.
Black-green heavy carapace, deep-brown abdomen armor, old iron, bone-white wax rings, dark-green belt, blackstone snow, muted dark-red impact mark.
